query_normalized: constraining lorentz invariance violation with fermi gamma‑ray burst spectra physics
rationale: The paper provides constraints on Lorentz invariance violation using high‑energy gamma‑ray spectral analysis, the same physical mechanism (photon dispersion‑relation LIV) that the user’s question concerns, even though it studies a blazar with H.E.S.S. rather than Fermi GRBs (acceptance category (a)).
